explanation: At 40 mph (59 feet/second), you need about 1.4 seconds to reach the intersection plus time to cross it, but safe braking from this distance is preferable to rushing the yellow light.

text: When backing out of a parking space in a parking lot, a pedestrian pushing a shopping cart approaches at 3 mph from 45 feet away. Your backing maneuver will take 18 seconds. Do you have right-of-way?
explanation: Pedestrians have right-of-way in parking lots, especially when vehicles are backing. At 3 mph, the pedestrian will reach your location in about 10 seconds.

choices.text: Yes, pedestrians must avoid moving vehicles
Yes, but only if you use your horn
No, only if the pedestrian is elderly

text: At a 3-way intersection with stop signs, Vehicle A (turning left) stops at 2:30:15 PM, Vehicle B (going straight) stops at 2:30:18 PM to the right of Vehicle A. A pedestrian enters the crosswalk at 2:30:25 PM. What's the movement order?
explanation: Pedestrians in crosswalks have absolute right-of-way. After the pedestrian clears, Vehicle B has right-of-way over left-turning Vehicle A.

choices.text: Pedestrian has right-of-way, then B, then A

text: On a divided highway with a 65 mph speed limit, you're in the right lane traveling 60 mph. An emergency vehicle approaches from behind with lights and sirens. The right shoulder is only 4 feet wide. What should you do?
explanation: When the shoulder is inadequate (less than 8 feet typically), move to another lane when safe rather than risk getting stuck on a narrow shoulder.

choices.text: Move to the left lane when safe

text: At an intersection with a 6-second pedestrian countdown, you're making a right turn. A pedestrian is 35 feet from your path walking at 3.5 feet per second, and a cyclist is 180 feet away traveling 20 mph. Who do you yield to first?
explanation: The pedestrian will reach the conflict point in 10 seconds, while the cyclist (at 29 feet/second) will arrive in about 6 seconds, but pedestrians always have priority over cyclists.

choices.text: Whoever reaches the conflict point first

text: Two funeral processions approach an intersection from different directions. Procession A has 12 vehicles with lead car arriving first, Procession B has 8 vehicles arriving 3 seconds later. How should this be resolved?
explanation: Funeral processions follow standard right-of-way rules at intersections. The first procession to arrive has right-of-way for the entire procession.

text: At a highway merge where your acceleration lane ends in 800 feet, you're traveling 35 mph and need to merge into traffic moving 70 mph with 4-second following distances. What's your primary obligation?
explanation: Merging vehicles must adjust to highway speeds and conditions. With 800 feet available, there's adequate distance to accelerate from 35 to 70 mph.

choices.text: Signal and expect others to yield
Match the speed of highway traffic
Use emergency flashers if going slower

text: In most residential neighborhoods, the speed limit is usually:
explanation: Residential areas have lower speed limits of 25-30 mph to protect pedestrians, children, and pets in neighborhood settings.

translations.text: En la mayoría de los barrios residenciales, el límite de velocidad usualmente es:
translations.explanation: Las áreas residenciales tienen límites de velocidad más bajos de 25-30 mph para proteger a los peatones, niños y mascotas en entornos vecinales.

translations.text: 在大多数住宅区，限速通常是：
translations.explanation: 住宅区设置较低的限速25-30英里/小时，以保护社区内的行人、儿童和宠物。

translations.text: Na maioria dos bairros residenciais, o limite de velocidade geralmente é:
translations.explanation: Áreas residenciais têm limites de velocidade mais baixos de 40-50 km/h para proteger pedestres, crianças e animais em ambientes residenciais.

translations.text: Dans la plupart des quartiers résidentiels, la limitation de vitesse est généralement:
translations.explanation: Les zones résidentielles ont des limitations de vitesse plus basses de 40-50 km/h pour protéger les piétons, les enfants et les animaux domestiques dans les environnements de quartier.

text: At a roundabout approach, you're 150 feet from the yield line traveling 20 mph. A large truck in the roundabout is 200 feet from your entry point traveling 15 mph. Should you yield?
explanation: All vehicles in the roundabout have absolute right-of-way over entering traffic, regardless of vehicle type or timing calculations.

choices.text: No, you'll reach the entry point first
Yes, vehicles in roundabout have right-of-way
No, trucks must yield to cars

text: When making a U-turn at an intersection, oncoming traffic is 400 feet away traveling 50 mph, and your U-turn will take 8 seconds to complete. Is this safe?
explanation: At 50 mph (73 feet/second), oncoming traffic will cover 584 feet in 8 seconds, easily reaching the intersection before you complete the U-turn.

choices.text: No, oncoming traffic is too close
Yes, if you accelerate during the turn

text: At a 4-way stop with arrival times: Vehicle A at 10:15:30 (going straight), Vehicle B at 10:15:33 (turning left), Vehicle C at 10:15:30 (turning right), and Vehicle D at 10:15:35 (going straight). What's the correct movement sequence?
explanation: Vehicles A and C arrived simultaneously and can proceed together safely (straight and right turn don't conflict), followed by B, then D in arrival order.

choices.text: A, C, B, D (by arrival time only)
C, A, B, D (right turns first)
A and C simultaneously, then B, then D
C, A, D, B (straight traffic priority)

text: A pedestrian with a walking disability using a cane is crossing at a marked crosswalk. The pedestrian signal shows 3 seconds remaining, and the pedestrian is moving at 2 feet per second, still 18 feet from safety. What's your obligation?
explanation: Drivers must yield to pedestrians with disabilities in crosswalks regardless of signal timing. The pedestrian needs 9 more seconds to reach safety.

text: At an uncontrolled intersection, Vehicle A approaches from the north at 25 mph, Vehicle B from the east at 30 mph (A's right). Both are 120 feet from intersection. A wants to turn left, B goes straight. Who yields?
explanation: Left-turning vehicles must yield to oncoming traffic. Although B is also from A's right, the left-turn yield rule takes precedence in this scenario.

text: On a narrow mountain road with 8-foot lanes, a school bus and a delivery truck meet. The bus has 6 students and is 35 feet long, the truck is 28 feet long. A pullout area is 150 feet behind the truck. Who should back up?
explanation: School buses have priority on narrow roads over commercial vehicles for safety reasons, regardless of size or passenger count.

choices.text: Whoever is closer to a pullout
The truck (commercial vehicle yields to school bus)

text: At a traffic light, you're turning right on red after stopping. A pedestrian starts crossing 40 feet away walking at 4 feet per second, and your turn will take 6 seconds. Is the turn legal?
explanation: When turning right on red, you must yield to all pedestrians in or approaching the crosswalk, regardless of distance or timing calculations.

choices.text: Yes, pedestrian is far enough away
No, must yield to all pedestrians
Yes, if you complete turn quickly
No, pedestrian will be in conflict zone

text: Two vehicles approach a narrow bridge simultaneously. The bridge has a 10-ton weight limit sign. Vehicle A is a 6-ton delivery truck, Vehicle B is a 12-ton semi-trailer. Both are 200 feet from the bridge. Who has right-of-way?
explanation: Vehicle B exceeds the bridge weight limit and cannot legally use the bridge, giving Vehicle A the right-of-way by default.

text: At a highway interchange, you're exiting at 45 mph while another vehicle is entering the highway at 50 mph. Your paths will intersect in 4 seconds, and both vehicles are 200 feet from the conflict point. Who yields?
explanation: Entering vehicles must yield to exiting traffic at highway interchanges. The entering vehicle should adjust speed or timing to avoid conflict.

text: At a controlled intersection during a power outage, 4 vehicles arrive within 2 seconds of each other. Vehicle positions: A-North, B-South, C-East, D-West. A and C want to turn left, B and D go straight. What's the safest protocol?
explanation: When signals are out, intersections become 4-way stops. Straight-moving traffic (B and D) would proceed first, then turning vehicles yield to oncoming traffic.

choices.text: Treat as 4-way stop, straight traffic first

text: At a 4-way intersection where you arrive simultaneously with vehicles to your left and right, with all three vehicles planning to turn left, who has the right of way?
explanation: When multiple vehicles are turning left simultaneously, all must yield to oncoming traffic before proceeding, regardless of arrival order.

choices.text: You have the right of way
All vehicles must yield to oncoming traffic first

translations.text: 在一个四向路口，您与左右两侧的车辆同时到达，三辆车都计划左转，谁有先行权？
translations.explanation: 当多辆车同时左转时，所有车辆都必须先让行对向来车，然后才能通行，与到达顺序无关。
choices: 所有车辆必须先让行对向来车

text: You're making a legal U-turn at an intersection when a pedestrian enters the crosswalk 15 feet ahead during your turn. What is your legal obligation?
explanation: Pedestrians always have right of way in crosswalks, and drivers must stop and yield even if they legally initiated their maneuver first.

choices.text: Complete your turn quickly since you had right of way
Stop immediately and yield to the pedestrian
Sound your horn to warn the pedestrian
Back up to your original position

translations.text: 您在路口合法掉头时，一名行人在您转弯过程中进入前方15英尺处的人行横道。您的法律义务是什么？
translations.explanation: 行人在人行横道内始终享有先行权，即使驾驶员已合法开始转弯，也必须停车让行。
choices: 快速完成转弯，因为您有先行权

text: At a T-intersection where you're on the terminating road turning right, and a vehicle on the through road is turning left into the same street, who yields?
explanation: Vehicles on terminating roads at T-intersections must yield to all traffic on the through road, including left-turning vehicles.

choices.text: The vehicle turning left yields to you
You yield to the vehicle turning left
Whoever arrives first has right of way
The larger vehicle has right of way

translations.text: 在T型路口，您在终端道路上右转，而主干道上的车辆正在左转进入同一条街道，谁让行？
translations.explanation: 在T型路口，终端道路上的车辆必须让行主干道上的所有车辆，包括左转车辆。

text: When emergency vehicles with active sirens approach from behind while you're in a funeral procession, what is the correct action?
explanation: Emergency vehicles with active signals always have absolute right of way, even over funeral processions, requiring immediate yielding.

choices.text: Continue with the procession; emergency vehicles must wait
Pull over immediately, breaking the procession
Speed up to clear the intersection quickly
Flash hazard lights but maintain position

translations.text: 当您在丧葬车队中行驶时，急救车辆鸣着警笛从后方接近，正确的做法是什么？
translations.explanation: 鸣响警报的急救车辆始终享有绝对先行权，即使对丧葬车队也是如此，需要立即让行。
choices: 继续跟随车队；急救车辆必须等待
立即靠边停车，打断车队
闪烁危险警示灯但保持位置

text: You're at a roundabout entrance where a cyclist is 50 feet away circulating inside the roundabout at 15 mph. Can you legally enter?
explanation: All traffic already circulating in a roundabout, including cyclists, has absolute right of way over entering vehicles.

choices.text: Yes, if you can merge safely before the cyclist reaches your position
No, you must wait for the cyclist to completely exit
Yes, motor vehicles have right of way over cyclists in roundabouts
Only if you signal and the cyclist acknowledges

translations.text: 您在环岛入口处，一名骑自行车者在环岛内50英尺远处以15英里/小时的速度行驶。您可以合法进入吗？
translations.explanation: 所有已在环岛内行驶的车辆，包括自行车，对进入车辆享有绝对先行权。
choices: 可以，如果您能在骑车者到达您的位置之前安全并入
不可以，您必须等待骑车者完全离开
可以，机动车在环岛内对自行车享有先行权
只有在您打信号且骑车者确认的情况下

text: At an intersection with a malfunctioning traffic signal, you arrive third in a sequence. How many vehicles from other directions must be allowed to proceed before your turn?
explanation: At intersections with failed signals, the intersection becomes an all-way stop where vehicles proceed in order of arrival regardless of direction.

choices.text: All vehicles that arrived before you from any direction
No specific number; proceed when safe

translations.text: 在交通信号灯故障的路口，您是第三个到达的。在轮到您之前，必须让其他方向的多少辆车先行？
translations.explanation: 在信号灯故障的路口，路口变成全向停车标志，车辆按到达顺序通行，不分方向。
choices: 所有比您先到达的车辆，无论来自哪个方向
没有具体数量；安全时通行

text: You're turning left from a one-way street onto another one-way street. A pedestrian enters the far crosswalk (your destination lane) just as you begin turning. Who has right of way?
explanation: Pedestrians have right of way in all crosswalks regardless of street configuration, and turning vehicles must always yield.

choices.text: You have right of way since both streets are one-way
The pedestrian has right of way in all crosswalks
The pedestrian only if the walk signal is active

translations.text: 您从单行道左转进入另一条单行道。当您开始转弯时，一名行人进入远端人行横道（您的目标车道）。谁有先行权？
translations.explanation: 无论街道配置如何，行人在所有人行横道内都享有先行权，转弯车辆必须始终让行。
choices: 您有先行权，因为两条街都是单行道
行人在所有人行横道内都有先行权
只有在行人信号灯亮起时行人才有先行权

text: At a 4-way stop, you arrive simultaneously with a school bus to your right that is turning left, and you are going straight. Who proceeds first?
explanation: At 4-way stops with simultaneous arrival, the vehicle to the right has right of way regardless of vehicle type or turning direction.

choices.text: You proceed first since the bus is turning
The school bus proceeds first due to special right of way
The school bus proceeds first since it's to your right
You must both wait for other traffic

translations.text: 在四向停车标志处，您与右侧左转的校车同时到达，而您直行。谁先通行？
translations.explanation: 在四向停车标志处同时到达时，右侧车辆享有先行权，不论车辆类型或转弯方向。
choices: 您先行，因为校车在转弯
校车因享有特殊先行权而先行
校车先行，因为它在您右侧
您们都必须等待其他车辆

text: You're in a center left-turn lane preparing to turn when an oncoming vehicle also enters the center lane to turn left onto the same street. Who has right of way?
explanation: When two vehicles use the center turn lane to turn left onto the same street, both must yield to each other and coordinate their turns safely.

choices.text: The vehicle that entered the center lane first
The vehicle making the sharper turn
Both must yield to each other and coordinate

translations.text: 您在中央左转车道准备转弯时，对向车辆也进入中央车道左转进入同一条街道。谁有先行权？
translations.explanation: 当两辆车使用中央转弯车道左转进入同一条街道时，双方都必须相互让行并协调转弯。
choices: 先进入中央车道的车辆
双方都必须相互让行并协调

text: A motorcycle is splitting lanes in stopped traffic and reaches an intersection where you're turning right from the curb lane. Who has right of way?
explanation: Right of way depends on local lane splitting laws; where legal, motorcycles may have right of way, where illegal, they don't.

choices.text: You have right of way since lane splitting is illegal
The motorcycle has right of way
Depends on whether lane splitting is legal in your state

translations.text: 摩托车在停滞交通中穿行车道并到达路口，您正从路边车道右转。谁有先行权？
translations.explanation: 先行权取决于当地的车道穿行法律；在合法的地方，摩托车可能有先行权，在非法的地方则没有。
choices: 您有先行权，因为车道穿行是违法的
取决于您所在州车道穿行是否合法
谁先完成动作谁就有先行权

text: You're exiting a parking lot onto a street where a vehicle is backing out of a driveway 30 feet to your right. Both of you enter the roadway simultaneously. Who yields?
explanation: Vehicles backing from driveways must yield to all other traffic, including vehicles entering from parking lots or other driveways.

choices.text: The vehicle backing from the driveway yields to you
You yield to the vehicle backing from the driveway
Whoever reaches the travel lane first has right of way
Both must yield to existing traffic only

translations.text: 您从停车场驶入街道，右侧30英尺处有车辆正从车道倒出。你们同时进入道路。谁让行？
translations.explanation: 从车道倒车的车辆必须让行所有其他车辆，包括从停车场或其他车道进入的车辆。
choices: 从车道倒车的车辆让行给您
您让行给从车道倒车的车辆
先到达行车道的车辆有先行权
双方都只需让行现有车辆

text: At an intersection where your green light just turned yellow 2 seconds ago, and you're 40 feet from the intersection at 25 mph, what is legally required?
explanation: Yellow lights legally require stopping if it can be done safely; at 25 mph, 40 feet provides adequate stopping distance.

choices.text: Accelerate to clear the intersection before red
Stop if you can do so safely
Continue at current speed through the intersection
Flash headlights and proceed with caution

translations.text: 在路口，您的绿灯刚刚变成黄灯2秒前，您以25英里/小时的速度距离路口40英尺，法律要求是什么？
translations.explanation: 黄灯在法律上要求在安全的情况下停车；以25英里/小时的速度，40英尺提供足够的停车距离。
choices: 加速在红灯前通过路口
如果能安全停车就停车
以当前速度继续通过路口

text: You're turning right on red after a complete stop when a pedestrian with a white cane begins crossing from your right, 10 feet into the crosswalk. What must you do?
explanation: Pedestrians, especially those with disabilities, always have absolute right of way in crosswalks, requiring complete yielding.

choices.text: Proceed slowly since you have right of way on red
Wait for the pedestrian to completely cross
Sound horn to alert the pedestrian
Gesture for the pedestrian to hurry

translations.text: 您在完全停车后红灯右转时，一名持白手杖的行人从您右侧开始过马路，已走入人行横道10英尺。您必须怎么做？
translations.explanation: 行人，特别是残疾人，在人行横道内始终享有绝对先行权，需要完全让行。
choices: 慢慢通行，因为您在红灯时有先行权

text: Two fire trucks approach the same intersection from perpendicular directions with sirens active. As a civilian driver, how do you determine who has right of way?
explanation: Multiple emergency vehicles must coordinate right of way among themselves; civilian drivers should clear the intersection entirely.

choices.text: The larger fire truck has priority
The first emergency vehicle to activate sirens
Emergency vehicles must coordinate among themselves
The emergency vehicle from your right

translations.text: 两辆消防车从垂直方向同时接近同一路口，警笛都在响。作为普通驾驶员，您如何确定谁有先行权？
translations.explanation: 多辆急救车辆必须相互协调先行权；普通驾驶员应完全清空路口。
choices: 较大的消防车有优先权
先启动警笛的急救车辆
急救车辆必须相互协调
来自您右侧的急救车辆

text: You're in a designated right-turn lane with a red arrow signal. A pedestrian is crossing the parallel street (not your path) 20 feet away. Can you proceed?
explanation: Red arrow signals create an absolute prohibition on movement in that direction, regardless of pedestrian location or traffic conditions.

choices.text: No, red arrows prohibit all movement
Yes, since the pedestrian isn't in your path
Yes, after yielding to the pedestrian
Only if no other traffic is present

translations.text: 您在指定右转车道遇到红色箭头信号。一名行人正在平行街道（不是您的路径）20英尺外过马路。您可以通行吗？
translations.explanation: 红色箭头信号对该方向的所有移动都绝对禁止，不论行人位置或交通状况。
choices: 不可以，红色箭头禁止所有移动
可以，因为行人不在您的路径上
只有在没有其他车辆时

text: At a highway on-ramp merger, you're accelerating when a vehicle in the right lane slows down to let you merge, but traffic in the left lane prevents the right-lane vehicle from changing lanes. Who has right of way?
explanation: Highway traffic always has right of way over merging traffic, even when highway drivers voluntarily attempt to yield space.

choices.text: You have right of way since the vehicle is yielding
The vehicle in the right lane has right of way
Both vehicles must yield to left-lane traffic

translations.text: 在高速公路匝道并线处，您在加速时右车道的车辆减速让您并入，但左车道的车辆阻止右车道车辆变道。谁有先行权？
translations.explanation: 高速公路车辆对并入车辆始终享有先行权，即使高速公路驾驶员主动尝试让出空间。
choices: 您有先行权，因为该车辆在让行
两辆车都必须让行左车道车辆

text: You're making a protected left turn when the green arrow ends and becomes a solid green light mid-turn, with oncoming traffic 100 feet away. What is your legal status?
explanation: Vehicles that legally entered an intersection during a protected phase may complete their turn even if the signal changes.

choices.text: You must stop immediately in the intersection
You may complete your turn safely
You must yield to oncoming traffic and stop
You must reverse back to your original lane

translations.text: 您在受保护左转时，绿色箭头结束变成实心绿灯，此时您正在转弯中途，对向车辆在100英尺外。您的法律地位是什么？
translations.explanation: 在保护阶段合法进入路口的车辆可以完成转弯，即使信号灯发生变化。
choices: 您必须立即在路口停车
您必须让行对向车辆并停车
您必须倒车回到原车道

text: A police officer directing traffic signals you to proceed straight through an intersection with a red light, while cross traffic has a green light. What is the correct action?
explanation: Police officers directing traffic have authority that supersedes all traffic signals and signs.

choices.text: Obey the traffic light and wait
Proceed only after cross traffic stops

translations.text: 交警指挥交通，示意您在红灯时直行通过路口，而横向车辆有绿灯。正确的做法是什么？
translations.explanation: 指挥交通的警察拥有超越所有交通信号灯和标志的权威。
choices: 只有在横向车辆停车后才通行

text: You're turning left at an intersection when a vehicle runs the red light from your left at high speed, entering the intersection 3 seconds after their light turned red. Who is legally at fault if a collision occurs?
explanation: A vehicle running a red light is legally at fault, even if the turning vehicle could have potentially avoided the collision.

choices.text: You are at fault for not yielding
The other driver is at fault for running the red light
Fault depends on the severity of injuries

translations.text: 您在路口左转时，一辆车从您左侧高速闯红灯，在红灯后3秒进入路口。如果发生碰撞，谁在法律上有过错？
translations.explanation: 闯红灯的车辆在法律上有过错，即使转弯车辆本可能避免碰撞。
choices: 您有过错，因为没有让行
另一名驾驶员因闯红灯有过错
两名驾驶员承担同等过错
过错取决于伤情严重程度

text: At a 3-way intersection where you're on the through street turning left, and a vehicle on the terminating street is turning right onto the same destination street, who has right of way?
explanation: Through-street traffic maintains right of way over terminating street traffic, even when both are turning onto the same street.

choices.text: You have right of way as the through-street traffic
The right-turning vehicle has right of way
Both must yield to each other
Whoever signals first has right of way

translations.text: 在三向路口，您在主干道上左转，终端道路上的车辆右转进入同一目标街道，谁有先行权？
translations.explanation: 主干道车辆对终端道路车辆保持先行权，即使双方都转入同一条街道。
choices: 您作为主干道车辆有先行权

text: You're driving in a funeral procession with headlights on when you approach a 4-way stop where other vehicles arrived first. What is your right of way status?
explanation: Funeral processions do not have legal right of way at stop signs and must follow normal traffic rules.

choices.text: Funeral processions have absolute right of way
You must stop and wait your turn like other vehicles
You may proceed if the procession leader goes first
Other vehicles should yield out of courtesy

translations.text: 您在开着前灯的丧葬车队中驾驶，接近四向停车标志，其他车辆先到达。您的先行权地位如何？
translations.explanation: 丧葬车队在停车标志处没有法律先行权，必须遵循正常交通规则。
choices: 丧葬车队享有绝对先行权
您必须停车并像其他车辆一样等待轮次
如果车队领头车先行，您可以通行
其他车辆应该出于礼貌让行

text: A school bus with flashing red lights is stopped on the opposite side of a divided highway (median barrier present). You're approaching from behind another vehicle at 45 mph. What is required?
explanation: Physical median barriers legally separate traffic flows, exempting opposite-direction traffic from school bus stopping requirements.

choices.text: Stop until the bus lights stop flashing
Reduce speed to 25 mph and proceed
Continue at normal speed since the median provides separation
Change lanes away from the bus

translations.text: 校车在分隔高速公路对侧（有中央隔离带）闪烁红灯停车。您以45英里/小时跟在另一辆车后面接近。需要做什么？
translations.explanation: 物理中央隔离带在法律上分隔车流，使对向车辆免于校车停车要求。
choices: 停车直到校车停止闪灯
减速至25英里/小时并通行
正常速度继续行驶，因为隔离带提供了分隔

text: You're entering a roundabout when an ambulance with active sirens approaches the roundabout from the next entrance (90 degrees clockwise from you). What is the correct procedure?
explanation: Emergency vehicles have right of way at roundabout entrances; non-emergency traffic should not enter when emergency vehicles are approaching.

choices.text: Enter and exit quickly at the next exit
Stop before entering and let the ambulance enter first
Enter normally since you're already committed
Enter and stop inside the roundabout

translations.text: 您进入环岛时，一辆鸣响警笛的救护车从下一个入口（顺时针90度方向）接近环岛。正确的程序是什么？
translations.explanation: 急救车辆在环岛入口享有先行权；非急救车辆在急救车辆接近时不应进入。
choices: 进入并在下一个出口快速离开
在进入前停车，让救护车先进入
正常进入，因为您已经承诺

text: At an intersection with a 4-second all-red clearance interval, you enter legally on yellow but your vehicle breaks down in the intersection. Cross traffic now has a green light. Who has right of way?
explanation: Disabled vehicles in intersections lose right of way status; moving traffic with green lights has right of way around the obstruction.

choices.text: Cross traffic has right of way around your vehicle
You maintain right of way until you can move
The first vehicle to reach the intersection
All traffic must treat it as a 4-way stop

translations.text: 在有4秒全红清空间隔的路口，您在黄灯时合法进入但车辆在路口抛锚。横向车辆现在有绿灯。谁有先行权？
translations.explanation: 路口内的故障车辆失去先行权地位；有绿灯的行驶车辆有权绕过障碍物。
choices: 横向车辆有权绕过您的车辆行驶
您保持先行权直到能够移动
第一个到达路口的车辆
所有车辆都必须视为四向停车

text: You're making a legal U-turn at a signalized intersection during a green light when a vehicle approaching from behind attempts to pass you on the right. Who has right of way?
explanation: Vehicles making legal U-turns have right of way to complete their maneuver; other vehicles cannot interfere with legal turning movements.

choices.text: The passing vehicle has right of way
You have right of way to complete your legal U-turn
Both vehicles must yield to oncoming traffic
The vehicle maintaining the straightest path

translations.text: 您在有信号灯的路口绿灯时合法掉头，后方接近的车辆试图从右侧超越您。谁有先行权？
translations.explanation: 进行合法掉头的车辆有权完成转弯动作；其他车辆不能干扰合法的转弯行为。
choices: 两车都必须让行对向车辆

text: What should you do when you see a speed limit sign?
explanation: Speed limit signs are legal requirements that all drivers must follow for safety and to avoid traffic violations.

translations.text: ¿Qué debe hacer cuando vea una señal de límite de velocidad?
translations.explanation: Las señales de límite de velocidad son requisitos legales que todos los conductores deben seguir por seguridad y para evitar infracciones de tránsito.
choices: Manejar más rápido que la señal

translations.text: 当你看到限速标志时应该怎么做？
translations.explanation: 限速标志是法律要求，所有驾驶员都必须遵守以确保安全并避免交通违章。
choices: 开得比标志要求的更快

translations.text: O que você deve fazer quando vir uma placa de limite de velocidade?
translations.explanation: Placas de limite de velocidade são exigências legais que todos os motoristas devem seguir para segurança e para evitar infrações de trânsito.
choices: Dirigir mais rápido que a placa indica

translations.text: Que devez-vous faire lorsque vous voyez un panneau de limitation de vitesse?
translations.explanation: Les panneaux de limitation de vitesse sont des exigences légales que tous les conducteurs doivent respecter pour la sécurité et pour éviter les infractions routières.
choices: Rouler plus vite que le panneau

text: School zones typically have speed limits of:
explanation: School zones have very low speed limits of 15-25 mph to protect children who may be walking or crossing streets.

translations.text: Las zonas escolares típicamente tienen límites de velocidad de:
translations.explanation: Las zonas escolares tienen límites de velocidad muy bajos de 15-25 mph para proteger a los niños que pueden estar caminando o cruzando las calles.

translations.text: 学校区域的限速通常是：
translations.explanation: 学校区域的限速很低，为15-25英里/小时，以保护可能步行或过马路的儿童。

translations.text: Zonas escolares tipicamente têm limites de velocidade de:
translations.explanation: Zonas escolares têm limites de velocidade muito baixos de 25-40 km/h para proteger crianças que podem estar caminhando ou atravessando ruas.

translations.text: Les zones scolaires ont généralement des limitations de vitesse de:
translations.explanation: Les zones scolaires ont des limitations de vitesse très basses de 25-40 km/h pour protéger les enfants qui peuvent marcher ou traverser les rues.

text: If there is no posted speed limit sign, you should:
explanation: Even without posted signs, drivers must always operate at reasonable and safe speeds appropriate for road conditions.

choices.text: Drive at a reasonable and safe speed

translations.text: Si no hay una señal de límite de velocidad publicada, usted debe:
translations.explanation: Incluso sin señales publicadas, los conductores siempre deben operar a velocidades razonables y seguras apropiadas para las condiciones del camino.
choices: Manejar a una velocidad razonable y segura

translations.text: 如果没有标示限速标志，你应该：
translations.explanation: 即使没有标示牌，驾驶员也必须始终以适合道路条件的合理安全速度行驶。
choices: 以合理安全的速度行驶

translations.text: Se não houver placa de limite de velocidade, você deve:
translations.explanation: Mesmo sem placas sinalizadas, motoristas devem sempre operar em velocidades razoáveis e seguras apropriadas para as condições da via.
choices: Dirigir em velocidade razoável e segura

translations.text: S'il n'y a pas de panneau de limitation de vitesse affiché, vous devriez:
translations.explanation: Même sans panneaux affichés, les conducteurs doivent toujours rouler à des vitesses raisonnables et sécuritaires appropriées aux conditions routières.
choices: Rouler à une vitesse raisonnable et sécuritaire

text: Speed limits are designed to:
explanation: Speed limits are established based on safety studies to reduce accidents and protect all road users.

translations.text: Los límites de velocidad están diseñados para:
translations.explanation: Los límites de velocidad se establecen basándose en estudios de seguridad para reducir accidentes y proteger a todos los usuarios de la carretera.
choices: Hacer más lentos todos los autos

translations.text: 限速的设计目的是：
translations.explanation: 限速是根据安全研究制定的，旨在减少事故并保护所有道路使用者。

translations.text: Limites de velocidade são projetados para:
translations.explanation: Limites de velocidade são estabelecidos baseados em estudos de segurança para reduzir acidentes e proteger todos os usuários da via.
choices: Diminuir a velocidade de todos os carros

translations.text: Les limitations de vitesse sont conçues pour:
translations.explanation: Les limitations de vitesse sont établies sur la base d'études de sécurité pour réduire les accidents et protéger tous les usagers de la route.

text: In construction zones, you should typically:
explanation: Construction zones require reduced speeds to protect workers and navigate safely around equipment and changing road conditions.

choices.text: Speed up to get through quickly

translations.text: En zonas de construcción, típicamente usted debe:
translations.explanation: Las zonas de construcción requieren velocidades reducidas para proteger a los trabajadores y navegar con seguridad alrededor del equipo y las condiciones cambiantes del camino.

translations.text: 在施工区域，你通常应该：
translations.explanation: 施工区域需要降低车速以保护工人，并安全通过设备和变化的道路条件。

translations.text: Em zonas de obras, você deve tipicamente:
translations.explanation: Zonas de obras requerem velocidades reduzidas para proteger trabalhadores e navegar com segurança ao redor de equipamentos e condições de via alteradas.

translations.text: Dans les zones de construction, vous devriez généralement:
translations.explanation: Les zones de construction exigent des vitesses réduites pour protéger les travailleurs et naviguer en sécurité autour de l'équipement et des conditions routières changeantes.

text: The speed limit on most city streets is usually:
explanation: City streets have moderate speed limits of 25-35 mph to accommodate traffic signals, pedestrians, and frequent stops.

translations.text: El límite de velocidad en la mayoría de las calles de la ciudad usualmente es:
translations.explanation: Las calles de la ciudad tienen límites de velocidad moderados de 25-35 mph para acomodar semáforos, peatones y paradas frecuentes.

translations.text: 大多数城市街道的限速通常是：
translations.explanation: 城市街道的限速适中，为25-35英里/小时，以适应交通信号、行人和频繁停车。

translations.text: O limite de velocidade na maioria das ruas urbanas é geralmente:
translations.explanation: Ruas urbanas têm limites de velocidade moderados de 40-60 km/h para acomodar semáforos, pedestres e paradas frequentes.

translations.text: La limitation de vitesse sur la plupart des rues urbaines est généralement:
translations.explanation: Les rues urbaines ont des limitations de vitesse modérées de 40-55 km/h pour accommoder les feux de circulation, les piétons et les arrêts fréquents.

text: When driving in bad weather, you should:
explanation: Poor weather conditions require driving at or below speed limits, as wet or icy roads reduce traction and visibility.

choices.text: Drive at the posted speed limit or slower

translations.text: Cuando maneje en mal clima, usted debe:
translations.explanation: Las condiciones climáticas adversas requieren manejar a velocidades iguales o menores a los límites de velocidad, ya que las carreteras mojadas o heladas reducen la tracción y visibilidad.
choices: Manejar al límite de velocidad publicado o más lento

translations.text: 在恶劣天气下驾驶时，你应该：
translations.explanation: 恶劣天气条件需要以限速或更低速度行驶，因为湿滑或结冰的道路会降低牵引力和能见度。
choices: 以限速或更慢的速度行驶

translations.text: Ao dirigir em condições climáticas adversas, você deve:
translations.explanation: Condições climáticas ruins requerem dirigir no limite de velocidade ou abaixo, pois estradas molhadas ou com gelo reduzem a aderência e visibilidade.
choices: Dirigir no limite de velocidade sinalizado ou mais devagar

translations.text: Lors de la conduite par mauvais temps, vous devriez:
translations.explanation: Les mauvaises conditions météorologiques exigent de rouler à la limitation de vitesse ou en dessous, car les routes mouillées ou glacées réduisent l'adhérence et la visibilité.
choices: Rouler à la limitation de vitesse affichée ou plus lentement

text: Speed limit signs are what color?
explanation: Standard speed limit signs are white with black text, making them easily visible and recognizable to all drivers.

translations.text: Placas de limite de velocidade são de que cor?
translations.explanation: Placas padrão de limite de velocidade são brancas com texto preto, tornando-as facilmente visíveis e reconhecíveis para todos os motoristas.

translations.text: ¿De qué color son las señales de límite de velocidad?
translations.explanation: Las señales estándar de límite de velocidad son blancas con texto negro, haciéndolas fácilmente visibles y reconocibles para todos los conductores.

translations.text: 限速标志是什么颜色的？
translations.explanation: 标准限速标志是白底黑字，让所有驾驶员都能轻松看见和识别。

translations.text: Les panneaux de limitation de vitesse sont de quelle couleur?
translations.explanation: Les panneaux de limitation de vitesse standard sont blancs avec du texte noir, les rendant facilement visibles et reconnaissables par tous les conducteurs.

text: Who sets speed limits on roads?
explanation: Speed limits are established by government authorities based on engineering studies, safety data, and road design.

translations.text: ¿Quién establece los límites de velocidad en las carreteras?
translations.explanation: Los límites de velocidad son establecidos por las autoridades gubernamentales basándose en estudios de ingeniería, datos de seguridad y diseño de carreteras.

translations.text: 谁制定道路限速？
translations.explanation: 限速由政府部门根据工程研究、安全数据和道路设计制定。

translations.text: Quem estabelece os limites de velocidade nas vias?
translations.explanation: Limites de velocidade são estabelecidos por autoridades governamentais baseados em estudos de engenharia, dados de segurança e design da via.

translations.text: Qui établit les limitations de vitesse sur les routes?
translations.explanation: Les limitations de vitesse sont établies par les autorités gouvernementales basées sur des études d'ingénierie, des données de sécurité et la conception routière.

text: If you drive faster than the speed limit, you may:
explanation: Exceeding speed limits is a traffic violation that can result in fines, tickets, and points on your driving record.

translations.text: Si maneja más rápido que el límite de velocidad, usted puede:
translations.explanation: Exceder los límites de velocidad es una infracción de tránsito que puede resultar en multas, tickets y puntos en su registro de manejo.

translations.text: 如果你超速驾驶，你可能会：
translations.explanation: 超过限速是交通违章行为，可能导致罚款、罚单和驾驶记录扣分。

translations.text: Se você dirigir mais rápido que o limite de velocidade, você pode:
translations.explanation: Exceder limites de velocidade é uma infração de trânsito que pode resultar em multas e pontos na carteira de habilitação.

translations.text: Si vous roulez plus vite que la limitation de vitesse, vous pourriez:
translations.explanation: Dépasser les limitations de vitesse est une infraction routière qui peut entraîner des amendes, des contraventions et des points sur votre dossier de conduite.

text: The minimum speed on some highways might be:
explanation: Some highways post minimum speeds around 40-45 mph to maintain safe traffic flow and prevent dangerous speed differences.

translations.text: La velocidad mínima en algunas autopistas podría ser:
translations.explanation: Algunas autopistas publican velocidades mínimas alrededor de 40-45 mph para mantener un flujo de tráfico seguro y prevenir diferencias de velocidad peligrosas.

translations.text: 某些高速公路的最低限速可能是：
translations.explanation: 一些高速公路标示最低限速约40-45英里/小时，以维持安全的交通流量并防止危险的速度差异。

translations.text: A velocidade mínima em algumas rodovias pode ser:
translations.explanation: Algumas rodovias sinalizam velocidades mínimas de cerca de 65-70 km/h para manter o fluxo seguro de trânsito e prevenir diferenças perigosas de velocidade.

translations.text: La vitesse minimale sur certaines autoroutes pourrait être:
translations.explanation: Certaines autoroutes affichent des vitesses minimales autour de 65-70 km/h pour maintenir un flux de circulation sécuritaire et prévenir les différences de vitesse dangereuses.

text: When entering a highway, you should:
explanation: Safely merging onto highways requires accelerating to match the speed of existing traffic flow.

translations.text: Al entrar a una autopista, usted debe:
translations.explanation: Incorporarse con seguridad a las autopistas requiere acelerar para igualar la velocidad del flujo de tráfico existente.

translations.text: 进入高速公路时，你应该：
translations.explanation: 安全汇入高速公路需要加速以匹配现有交通流的速度。

translations.text: Ao entrar em uma rodovia, você deve:
translations.explanation: Fazer conversão segura para rodovias requer acelerar para igualar a velocidade do fluxo de trânsito existente.

translations.text: Lors de l'entrée sur une autoroute, vous devriez:
translations.explanation: S'insérer en sécurité sur les autoroutes nécessite d'accélérer pour égaler la vitesse du flux de circulation existant.
choices: Égaler la vitesse de la circulation

text: Speed limits in parking lots are typically:
explanation: Parking lots require very slow speeds of 5-15 mph due to pedestrians, backing vehicles, and limited visibility.

translations.text: Les limitations de vitesse dans les stationnements sont généralement:
translations.explanation: Les stationnements exigent des vitesses très lentes de 8-25 km/h en raison des piétons, des véhicules en marche arrière et de la visibilité limitée.

translations.text: Los límites de velocidad en estacionamientos típicamente son:
translations.explanation: Los estacionamientos requieren velocidades muy lentas de 5-15 mph debido a peatones, vehículos en reversa y visibilidad limitada.

translations.text: 停车场的限速通常是：
translations.explanation: 停车场需要很慢的速度5-15英里/小时，因为有行人、倒车车辆和有限的视线。

translations.text: Limites de velocidade em estacionamentos são tipicamente:
translations.explanation: Estacionamentos requerem velocidades muito baixas de 8-25 km/h devido a pedestres, veículos fazendo baliza e visibilidade limitada.

text: What does 'mph' stand for on speed limit signs?
explanation: MPH stands for 'miles per hour,' the standard measurement for vehicle speed in the United States.

translations.text: ¿Qué significa 'mph' en las señales de límite de velocidad?
translations.explanation: MPH significa 'millas por hora', la medida estándar para la velocidad de vehículos en los Estados Unidos.

translations.text: 限速标志上的'mph'代表什么？
translations.explanation: MPH代表'英里每小时'，是美国车辆速度的标准计量单位。

translations.text: O que significa 'km/h' nas placas de limite de velocidade?
translations.explanation: Km/h significa 'quilômetros por hora', a medida padrão para velocidade de veículos no Brasil.

translations.text: Que signifie 'mph' sur les panneaux de limitation de vitesse?
translations.explanation: MPH signifie 'miles per hour' (miles par heure), la mesure standard pour la vitesse des véhicules aux États-Unis.

text: Speed limits help prevent:
explanation: Appropriate speed limits significantly reduce the likelihood and severity of traffic accidents by controlling vehicle speeds.

translations.text: Los límites de velocidad ayudan a prevenir:
translations.explanation: Los límites de velocidad apropiados reducen significativamente la probabilidad y severidad de accidentes de tráfico al controlar las velocidades de los vehículos.

translations.text: 限速有助于防止：
translations.explanation: 适当的限速通过控制车辆速度显著降低交通事故的可能性和严重程度。

translations.text: Limites de velocidade ajudam a prevenir:
translations.explanation: Limites de velocidade apropriados reduzem significativamente a probabilidade e gravidade de acidentes de trânsito ao controlar velocidades de veículos.

translations.text: Les limitations de vitesse aident à prévenir:
translations.explanation: Les limitations de vitesse appropriées réduisent considérablement la probabilité et la gravité des accidents de circulation en contrôlant les vitesses des véhicules.

text: When you see a lower speed limit sign ahead, you should:
explanation: Approaching lower speed limit zones requires gradually reducing speed before reaching the new limit area.

translations.text: Cuando vea una señal de límite de velocidad más bajo adelante, usted debe:
translations.explanation: Al acercarse a zonas con límites de velocidad más bajos se requiere reducir gradualmente la velocidad antes de llegar al área del nuevo límite.

translations.text: 当你看到前方有较低限速标志时，你应该：
translations.explanation: 接近较低限速区域需要在到达新限速区域之前逐渐减速。

translations.text: Quando você vir uma placa de limite de velocidade menor à frente, você deve:
translations.explanation: Aproximar-se de zonas com limite de velocidade menor requer reduzir gradualmente a velocidade antes de chegar à nova área limite.

translations.text: Lorsque vous voyez un panneau de limitation de vitesse plus basse à l'avant, vous devriez:
translations.explanation: S'approcher de zones de limitation de vitesse plus basse nécessite de réduire graduellement la vitesse avant d'atteindre la nouvelle zone limite.

text: At night, you might need to drive:
explanation: Reduced visibility at night often requires driving at or below posted speed limits for safety.

choices.text: At or below the speed limit

translations.text: En la noche, usted podría necesitar manejar:
translations.explanation: La visibilidad reducida en la noche a menudo requiere manejar a velocidades iguales o menores a los límites de velocidad publicados por seguridad.
choices: Al límite de velocidad o por debajo

translations.text: 在夜间，你可能需要：
translations.explanation: 夜间能见度降低，出于安全考虑通常需要以限速或更低速度行驶。
choices: 以限速或更低速度行驶

translations.text: À noite, você pode precisar dirigir:
translations.explanation: Visibilidade reduzida à noite frequentemente requer dirigir no limite de velocidade sinalizado ou abaixo por segurança.
choices: No limite de velocidade ou abaixo

translations.text: La nuit, vous pourriez avoir besoin de rouler:
translations.explanation: La visibilité réduite la nuit exige souvent de rouler à la limitation de vitesse affichée ou en dessous pour la sécurité.
choices: À la limitation de vitesse ou en dessous

text: Speed limits are the same:
explanation: Speed limits vary based on road type, location, and safety requirements, with highways having higher limits than residential streets.

translations.text: Los límites de velocidad son los mismos:
translations.explanation: Los límites de velocidad varían basándose en el tipo de carretera, ubicación y requisitos de seguridad, con las autopistas teniendo límites más altos que las calles residenciales.
choices: Nunca se publican en ningún lugar

translations.text: 限速在全国各地：
translations.explanation: 限速根据道路类型、位置和安全要求而不同，高速公路的限速比住宅街道高。
choices: 在不同类型道路上不同

translations.text: Limites de velocidade são os mesmos:
translations.explanation: Limites de velocidade variam baseados no tipo de via, localização e requisitos de segurança, com rodovias tendo limites maiores que ruas residenciais.

translations.text: Les limitations de vitesse sont les mêmes:
translations.explanation: Les limitations de vitesse varient selon le type de route, l'emplacement et les exigences de sécurité, les autoroutes ayant des limites plus élevées que les rues résidentielles.

text: Construction zone speed limits are usually:
explanation: Construction zones typically reduce speed limits to protect workers and account for changed road conditions and equipment.

translations.text: Los límites de velocidad en zonas de construcción usualmente son:
translations.explanation: Las zonas de construcción típicamente reducen los límites de velocidad para proteger a los trabajadores y considerar las condiciones cambiantes de la carretera y el equipo.
choices: No se publican en ningún lugar

translations.text: 施工区域的限速通常：
translations.explanation: 施工区域通常降低限速以保护工人并适应变化的道路条件和设备。

translations.text: Limites de velocidade em zonas de obras são geralmente:
translations.explanation: Zonas de obras tipicamente reduzem limites de velocidade para proteger trabalhadores e considerar condições de via alteradas e equipamentos.

translations.text: Les limitations de vitesse des zones de construction sont généralement:
translations.explanation: Les zones de construction réduisent généralement les limitations de vitesse pour protéger les travailleurs et tenir compte des conditions routières modifiées et de l'équipement.

text: If you're driving too slowly on a highway, you might:
explanation: Driving significantly slower than traffic flow can create dangerous situations and may impede the normal flow of traffic.

translations.text: Si maneja muy lentamente en una autopista, usted podría:
translations.explanation: Manejar significativamente más lento que el flujo de tráfico puede crear situaciones peligrosas y puede impedir el flujo normal del tráfico.

translations.text: 如果你在高速公路上开得太慢，你可能会：
translations.explanation: 开得明显比交通流慢可能造成危险情况，并可能阻碍正常的交通流。

translations.text: Se você estiver dirigindo muito devagar em uma rodovia, você pode:
translations.explanation: Dirigir significativamente mais devagar que o fluxo de trânsito pode criar situações perigosas e pode impedir o fluxo normal de trânsito.

translations.text: Si vous roulez trop lentement sur une autoroute, vous pourriez:
translations.explanation: Rouler considérablement plus lentement que le flux de circulation peut créer des situations dangereuses et peut entraver le flux normal de la circulation.

text: Speed limit signs apply to:
explanation: Speed limit signs are legal requirements that apply to all vehicles on the road, regardless of type or driver experience.

translations.text: Las señales de límite de velocidad se aplican a:
translations.explanation: Las señales de límite de velocidad son requisitos legales que se aplican a todos los vehículos en la carretera, sin importar el tipo o la experiencia del conductor.

translations.text: 限速标志适用于：
translations.explanation: 限速标志是法律要求，适用于道路上的所有车辆，无论车型或驾驶员经验如何。

translations.text: Placas de limite de velocidade se aplicam a:
translations.explanation: Placas de limite de velocidade são exigências legais que se aplicam a todos os veículos na via, independentemente do tipo ou experiência do motorista.

translations.text: Les panneaux de limitation de vitesse s'appliquent à:
translations.explanation: Les panneaux de limitation de vitesse sont des exigences légales qui s'appliquent à tous les véhicules sur la route, peu importe le type ou l'expérience du conducteur.

text: When leaving a highway, you should:
explanation: Exiting highways safely requires gradually reducing speed to match the lower speed limits of surface streets.

translations.text: Al salir de una autopista, usted debe:
translations.explanation: Salir de las autopistas con seguridad requiere reducir gradualmente la velocidad para igualar los límites de velocidad más bajos de las calles superficiales.

translations.text: 离开高速公路时，你应该：
translations.explanation: 安全驶离高速公路需要逐渐减速以适应地面街道较低的限速。

translations.text: Ao sair de uma rodovia, você deve:
translations.explanation: Sair de rodovias com segurança requer reduzir gradualmente a velocidade para igualar os limites de velocidade menores das vias urbanas.

translations.text: Lors de la sortie d'une autoroute, vous devriez:
translations.explanation: Sortir des autoroutes en sécurité nécessite de réduire graduellement la vitesse pour égaler les limitations de vitesse plus basses des rues de surface.

text: Speed limits in business districts are typically:
explanation: Business districts have moderate speed limits of 25-35 mph to accommodate pedestrians, frequent stops, and commercial activity.

translations.text: Los límites de velocidad en distritos comerciales típicamente son:
translations.explanation: Los distritos comerciales tienen límites de velocidad moderados de 25-35 mph para acomodar peatones, paradas frecuentes y actividad comercial.

translations.text: 商业区的限速通常是：
translations.explanation: 商业区的限速适中，为25-35英里/小时，以适应行人、频繁停车和商业活动。

translations.text: Limites de velocidade em distritos comerciais são tipicamente:
translations.explanation: Distritos comerciais têm limites de velocidade moderados de 40-60 km/h para acomodar pedestres, paradas frequentes e atividade comercial.

translations.text: Les limitations de vitesse dans les districts commerciaux sont généralement:
translations.explanation: Les districts commerciaux ont des limitations de vitesse modérées de 40-55 km/h pour accommoder les piétons, les arrêts fréquents et l'activité commerciale.

text: What does a speed limit sign tell drivers?
explanation: Speed limit signs indicate the maximum legal speed you can drive on that road under normal conditions.

translations.text: ¿Qué les dice una señal de límite de velocidad a los conductores?
translations.explanation: Las señales de límite de velocidad indican la velocidad legal máxima que puede conducir en esa carretera bajo condiciones normales.

translations.text: 限速标志告诉驾驶员什么？
translations.explanation: 限速标志表示在正常条件下您在该道路上可以驾驶的最高合法速度。

translations.text: O que uma placa de limite de velocidade indica aos motoristas?
translations.explanation: Placas de limite de velocidade indicam a velocidade máxima legal que você pode dirigir naquela via sob condições normais.

translations.text: Que signifie un panneau de limitation de vitesse pour les conducteurs ?
translations.explanation: Les panneaux de limitation de vitesse indiquent la vitesse maximale légale à laquelle vous pouvez rouler sur cette route dans des conditions normales.

text: When you see a speed limit sign showing 35 mph, what should you do?
explanation: Speed limit signs show the maximum speed allowed, meaning you should never exceed that speed but can drive slower when conditions require it.

choices.text: Drive exactly 35 mph at all times
Ignore the sign if traffic is light

translations.text: Cuando ve una señal de límite de velocidad que muestra 35 mph, ¿qué debe hacer?
translations.explanation: Las señales de límite de velocidad muestran la velocidad máxima permitida, lo que significa que nunca debe exceder esa velocidad pero puede conducir más lento cuando las condiciones lo requieran.
choices: Conducir exactamente a 35 mph en todo momento
Nunca conducir más rápido de 35 mph
Siempre conducir por lo menos a 35 mph
Ignorar la señal si el tráfico es ligero

translations.text: 当您看到显示35英里每小时的限速标志时，您应该怎么做？
translations.explanation: 限速标志显示允许的最高速度，意味着您绝不应超过该速度，但在条件需要时可以慢速行驶。
choices: 始终以35英里每小时的速度行驶
至少以35英里每小时的速度行驶
如果交通稀少则忽略标志

translations.text: Quando você vê uma placa de limite de velocidade mostrando 60 km/h, o que deve fazer?
translations.explanation: Placas de limite de velocidade mostram a velocidade máxima permitida, significando que você nunca deve exceder essa velocidade, mas pode dirigir mais devagar quando as condições exigirem.
choices: Dirigir exatamente a 60 km/h o tempo todo
Nunca dirigir mais rápido que 60 km/h
Sempre dirigir pelo menos a 60 km/h
Ignorar a placa se o trânsito estiver leve

translations.text: Quand vous voyez un panneau de limitation de vitesse indiquant 55 km/h, que devez-vous faire ?
translations.explanation: Les panneaux de limitation de vitesse indiquent la vitesse maximale autorisée, ce qui signifie que vous ne devez jamais dépasser cette vitesse mais pouvez rouler plus lentement si les conditions l'exigent.
choices: Rouler exactement à 55 km/h en tout temps
Ne jamais rouler plus vite que 55 km/h
Toujours rouler au moins à 55 km/h
Ignorer le panneau si la circulation est fluide

text: What color are most speed limit signs?
explanation: Standard speed limit signs are rectangular with black numbers on a white background.

translations.text: ¿De qué color son la mayoría de las señales de límite de velocidad?
translations.explanation: Las señales estándar de límite de velocidad son rectangulares con números negros sobre fondo blanco.

translations.text: 大多数限速标志是什么颜色的？
translations.explanation: 标准限速标志为长方形，白色背景上有黑色数字。

translations.text: Qual é a cor da maioria das placas de limite de velocidade?
translations.explanation: Placas padrão de limite de velocidade são retangulares com números pretos sobre fundo branco.

translations.text: De quelle couleur sont la plupart des panneaux de limitation de vitesse ?
translations.explanation: Les panneaux de limitation de vitesse standard sont rectangulaires avec des chiffres noirs sur fond blanc.

text: If there is no posted speed limit sign, what should you do?
explanation: Even without posted signs, there are standard speed limits that apply to different types of roads like residential areas, highways, and school zones.

choices.text: Drive as fast as you want
Follow the default speed limits for that type of road

translations.text: Si no hay una señal de límite de velocidad publicada, ¿qué debe hacer?
translations.explanation: Aun sin señales publicadas, hay límites de velocidad estándar que se aplican a diferentes tipos de carreteras como áreas residenciales, autopistas y zonas escolares.
choices: Seguir los límites de velocidad predeterminados para ese tipo de carretera
Detenerse y llamar a la policía

translations.text: 如果没有张贴限速标志，您应该怎么做？
translations.explanation: 即使没有张贴标志，也有适用于不同类型道路（如住宅区、高速公路和学校区域）的标准限速。
choices: 遵循该类型道路的默认限速
严格以55英里每小时行驶

translations.text: Se não há placa de limite de velocidade sinalizada, o que você deve fazer?
translations.explanation: Mesmo sem placas sinalizadas, existem limites de velocidade padrão que se aplicam a diferentes tipos de vias como áreas residenciais, rodovias e zonas escolares.
choices: Seguir os limites de velocidade padrão para esse tipo de via
Parar e ligar para a polícia

translations.text: S'il n'y a pas de panneau de limitation de vitesse affiché, que devez-vous faire ?
translations.explanation: Même sans panneaux affichés, il existe des limitations de vitesse standard qui s'appliquent aux différents types de routes comme les zones résidentielles, autoroutes et zones scolaires.
choices: Rouler aussi vite que vous voulez
Suivre les limitations de vitesse par défaut pour ce type de route

text: Speed limits are set to help ensure what?
explanation: Speed limits are established primarily to promote the safety of drivers, passengers, pedestrians, and other road users.

choices.text: Traffic moves as fast as possible

translations.text: Los límites de velocidad se establecen para ayudar a asegurar ¿qué?
translations.explanation: Los límites de velocidad se establecen principalmente para promover la seguridad de conductores, pasajeros, peatones y otros usuarios de la carretera.
choices: El tráfico se mueva lo más rápido posible
La seguridad de todos los usuarios de la carretera

translations.text: 设置限速是为了帮助确保什么？
translations.explanation: 限速的建立主要是为了促进驾驶员、乘客、行人和其他道路使用者的安全。
choices: 所有道路使用者的安全

translations.text: Os limites de velocidade são estabelecidos para ajudar a garantir o quê?
translations.explanation: Os limites de velocidade são estabelecidos principalmente para promover a segurança de motoristas, passageiros, pedestres e outros usuários da via.
choices: O trânsito se mova o mais rápido possível
Segurança de todos os usuários da via

translations.text: Les limitations de vitesse sont établies pour assurer quoi ?
translations.explanation: Les limitations de vitesse sont établies principalement pour promouvoir la sécurité des conducteurs, passagers, piétons et autres usagers de la route.
choices: Que les voitures consomment moins d'essence
Que la circulation soit la plus rapide possible
La sécurité de tous les usagers de la route
Que les conducteurs arrivent à l'heure

text: What happens if you drive much slower than the speed limit?
explanation: While you shouldn't exceed speed limits, driving significantly slower than traffic flow can also create safety hazards and impede other drivers.

choices.text: You get a ticket for speeding

translations.text: ¿Qué pasa si conduce mucho más lento que el límite de velocidad?
translations.explanation: Aunque no debe exceder los límites de velocidad, conducir significativamente más lento que el flujo del tráfico también puede crear peligros de seguridad e impedir a otros conductores.
choices: Recibe una multa por exceso de velocidad
Podría impedir el flujo del tráfico

translations.text: 如果您开得比限速慢很多会怎样？
translations.explanation: 虽然您不应超过限速，但开得明显比交通流慢也可能造成安全隐患并妨碍其他驾驶员。
choices: 您会因超速而收到罚单

translations.text: O que acontece se você dirigir muito mais devagar que o limite de velocidade?
translations.explanation: Embora você não deva exceder os limites de velocidade, dirigir significativamente mais devagar que o fluxo do trânsito também pode criar riscos de segurança e atrapalhar outros motoristas.
choices: Você recebe uma multa por excesso de velocidade
Você pode atrapalhar o fluxo do trânsito

translations.text: Que se passe-t-il si vous roulez beaucoup plus lentement que la limitation de vitesse ?
translations.explanation: Bien que vous ne devriez pas dépasser les limitations de vitesse, rouler significativement plus lentement que le flux de circulation peut aussi créer des dangers et gêner les autres conducteurs.
choices: Vous recevez une contravention pour excès de vitesse

text: In a residential neighborhood, the typical speed limit is usually around what?
explanation: Most residential areas have speed limits around 25 mph to ensure safety near homes, children, and pedestrians.

translations.text: En un vecindario residencial, el límite de velocidad típico es usualmente alrededor de ¿qué?
translations.explanation: La mayoría de las áreas residenciales tienen límites de velocidad alrededor de 25 mph para asegurar la seguridad cerca de hogares, niños y peatones.

translations.text: 在住宅区，典型的限速通常大约是多少？
translations.explanation: 大多数住宅区的限速约为25英里每小时，以确保住宅、儿童和行人附近的安全。

translations.text: Em um bairro residencial, o limite de velocidade típico geralmente é cerca de quanto?
translations.explanation: A maioria das áreas residenciais tem limites de velocidade em torno de 40 km/h para garantir segurança perto de casas, crianças e pedestres.

translations.text: Dans un quartier résidentiel, la limitation de vitesse typique est généralement d'environ ?
translations.explanation: La plupart des zones résidentielles ont des limitations de vitesse d'environ 40 km/h pour assurer la sécurité près des maisons, enfants et piétons.

text: What should you do when driving conditions are poor (rain, fog, snow)?
explanation: Poor weather conditions require you to reduce speed below the posted limit to maintain control and safety.

choices.text: Drive faster to get through quickly
Maintain the posted speed limit exactly
Drive slower than the speed limit
Turn on hazard lights and speed up

translations.text: ¿Qué debe hacer cuando las condiciones de manejo son malas (lluvia, niebla, nieve)?
translations.explanation: Las condiciones climáticas adversas requieren que reduzca la velocidad por debajo del límite publicado para mantener el control y la seguridad.
choices: Conducir más rápido para pasar rápidamente
Mantener exactamente el límite de velocidad publicado
Conducir más lento que el límite de velocidad
Encender las luces de emergencia y acelerar

translations.text: 当驾驶条件恶劣（雨、雾、雪）时，您应该怎么做？
translations.explanation: 恶劣天气条件要求您将速度降至张贴限速以下，以保持控制和安全。
choices: 开得更快以便快速通过
打开危险警示灯并加速

translations.text: O que você deve fazer quando as condições de direção estão ruins (chuva, neblina, neve)?
translations.explanation: Condições climáticas ruins exigem que você reduza a velocidade abaixo do limite sinalizado para manter controle e segurança.
choices: Dirigir mais rápido para passar rapidamente
Manter exatamente o limite de velocidade sinalizado
Dirigir mais devagar que o limite de velocidade

translations.text: Que devez-vous faire quand les conditions de conduite sont mauvaises (pluie, brouillard, neige) ?
translations.explanation: Les conditions météorologiques défavorables exigent de réduire la vitesse en dessous de la limite affichée pour maintenir le contrôle et la sécurité.
choices: Rouler plus vite pour passer rapidement
Maintenir exactement la limitation de vitesse affichée
Rouler plus lentement que la limitation de vitesse
Allumer les feux de détresse et accélérer

text: Speed limit signs apply to which vehicles?
explanation: Speed limits apply to all motor vehicles using the roadway unless specific signs indicate different limits for certain vehicle types.

choices.text: All motor vehicles unless otherwise specified

translations.text: Las señales de límite de velocidad se aplican a ¿cuáles vehículos?
translations.explanation: Los límites de velocidad se aplican a todos los vehículos motorizados que usan la carretera a menos que señales específicas indiquen límites diferentes para ciertos tipos de vehículos.
choices: Todos los vehículos motorizados a menos que se especifique lo contrario
Solo vehículos con placas de matrícula

translations.text: 限速标志适用于哪些车辆？
translations.explanation: 限速适用于使用道路的所有机动车辆，除非特定标志指出某些车辆类型有不同限速。
choices: 除非另有规定，否则适用于所有机动车辆

translations.text: As placas de limite de velocidade se aplicam a quais veículos?
translations.explanation: Os limites de velocidade se aplicam a todos os veículos automotores usando a via, a menos que placas específicas indiquem limites diferentes para certos tipos de veículos.
choices: Todos os veículos automotores, salvo especificação contrária

translations.text: Les panneaux de limitation de vitesse s'appliquent à quels véhicules ?
translations.explanation: Les limitations de vitesse s'appliquent à tous les véhicules automobiles utilisant la chaussée sauf si des panneaux spécifiques indiquent des limites différentes pour certains types de véhicules.
choices: Tous les véhicules automobiles sauf indication contraire
Seulement les véhicules avec plaques d'immatriculation

text: What does it mean when you see 'SPEED LIMIT 45' on a sign?
explanation: A speed limit sign indicates the maximum speed allowed on that section of road under normal conditions.

choices.text: 45 mph is the fastest you should drive
You should drive at least 45 mph

translations.text: ¿Qué significa cuando ve 'LÍMITE DE VELOCIDAD 45' en una señal?
translations.explanation: Una señal de límite de velocidad indica la velocidad máxima permitida en esa sección de carretera bajo condiciones normales.
choices: 45 mph es lo más rápido que debe conducir
Debe conducir por lo menos a 45 mph
La carretera tiene 45 millas de largo

translations.text: 当您在标志上看到'限速45'时意味着什么？
translations.explanation: 限速标志表示在正常条件下该路段允许的最高速度。
choices: 您必须严格以45英里每小时行驶
45英里每小时是您应该行驶的最快速度
您应该至少以45英里每小时行驶

translations.text: O que significa quando você vê 'VELOCIDADE MÁXIMA 70' em uma placa?
translations.explanation: Uma placa de limite de velocidade indica a velocidade máxima permitida naquela seção da via sob condições normais.
choices: Você deve dirigir exatamente a 70 km/h
70 km/h é o máximo que você deve dirigir
Você deve dirigir pelo menos a 70 km/h
A via tem 70 quilômetros de extensão

translations.text: Que signifie quand vous voyez 'MAXIMUM 70' sur un panneau ?
translations.explanation: Un panneau de limitation de vitesse indique la vitesse maximale autorisée sur cette section de route dans des conditions normales.
choices: Vous devez rouler exactement à 70 km/h
70 km/h est le plus vite que vous devriez rouler
Vous devriez rouler au moins à 70 km/h
La route fait 70 kilomètres de long

text: Where are you most likely to see lower speed limits?
explanation: School zones typically have reduced speed limits to protect children and pedestrians in areas where kids are present.

translations.text: ¿Dónde es más probable que vea límites de velocidad más bajos?
translations.explanation: Las zonas escolares típicamente tienen límites de velocidad reducidos para proteger a niños y peatones en áreas donde hay niños presentes.

translations.text: 您最可能在哪里看到较低的限速？
translations.explanation: 学校区域通常有降低的限速，以保护在有儿童出现的区域内的儿童和行人。

translations.text: Onde é mais provável que você veja limites de velocidade menores?
translations.explanation: Zonas escolares tipicamente têm limites de velocidade reduzidos para proteger crianças e pedestres em áreas onde há presença infantil.

translations.text: Où êtes-vous le plus susceptible de voir des limitations de vitesse plus basses ?
translations.explanation: Les zones scolaires ont généralement des limitations de vitesse réduites pour protéger les enfants et piétons dans les zones où des enfants sont présents.

text: What is the purpose of having different speed limits on different roads?
explanation: Different roads have different speed limits based on factors like traffic density, road design, pedestrian activity, and safety considerations.

choices.text: To match the road's design and safety needs
To make some roads more popular

translations.text: ¿Cuál es el propósito de tener diferentes límites de velocidad en diferentes carreteras?
translations.explanation: Diferentes carreteras tienen diferentes límites de velocidad basados en factores como densidad del tráfico, diseño de la carretera, actividad peatonal y consideraciones de seguridad.
choices: Para coincidir con el diseño y necesidades de seguridad de la carretera
Para hacer algunas carreteras más populares
Para aumentar los ingresos por multas

translations.text: 在不同道路上设置不同限速的目的是什么？
translations.explanation: 不同道路有不同限速是基于交通密度、道路设计、行人活动和安全考虑等因素。
choices: 为了匹配道路的设计和安全需求
为了使某些道路更受欢迎

translations.text: Qual é o propósito de ter diferentes limites de velocidade em diferentes vias?
translations.explanation: Diferentes vias têm diferentes limites de velocidade baseados em fatores como densidade de tráfego, design da via, atividade de pedestres e considerações de segurança.
choices: Para combinar com o design e necessidades de segurança da via
Para tornar algumas vias mais populares
Para aumentar a arrecadação com multas

translations.text: Quel est le but d'avoir différentes limitations de vitesse sur différentes routes ?
translations.explanation: Différentes routes ont différentes limitations de vitesse basées sur des facteurs comme la densité de circulation, la conception routière, l'activité piétonne et les considérations de sécurité.
choices: Pour correspondre à la conception et aux besoins de sécurité de la route
Pour rendre certaines routes plus populaires
Pour augmenter les revenus de contraventions

text: If you're driving and see a speed limit sign, when does that speed limit begin?
explanation: Speed limit signs take effect immediately at the point where the sign is posted.

choices.text: At the location of the sign
When you remember to change speed

translations.text: Si está conduciendo y ve una señal de límite de velocidad, ¿cuándo comienza ese límite de velocidad?
translations.explanation: Las señales de límite de velocidad toman efecto inmediatamente en el punto donde la señal está colocada.
choices: Una milla después de la señal
En la ubicación de la señal
Solo durante las horas del día

translations.text: 如果您在驾驶时看到限速标志，该限速何时开始生效？
translations.explanation: 限速标志在张贴标志的位置立即生效。

translations.text: Se você está dirigindo e vê uma placa de limite de velocidade, quando esse limite de velocidade entra em vigor?
translations.explanation: Placas de limite de velocidade entram em vigor imediatamente no ponto onde a placa está localizada.
choices: Quando você lembra de mudar a velocidade

translations.text: Si vous conduisez et voyez un panneau de limitation de vitesse, quand cette limitation commence-t-elle ?
translations.explanation: Les panneaux de limitation de vitesse prennent effet immédiatement à l'endroit où le panneau est affiché.
choices: Seulement pendant les heures de jour
Quand vous vous rappelez de changer de vitesse

text: What should you consider besides the posted speed limit when choosing your driving speed?
explanation: Safe driving speed depends on posted limits as well as current conditions like weather, traffic, visibility, and road surface.

choices.text: What other drivers are doing only

translations.text: ¿Qué debe considerar además del límite de velocidad publicado al elegir su velocidad de manejo?
translations.explanation: La velocidad de manejo segura depende de los límites publicados así como de las condiciones actuales como clima, tráfico, visibilidad y superficie de la carretera.
choices: Solo el límite de velocidad importa
Tráfico, clima y condiciones de la carretera
Solo lo que están haciendo otros conductores

translations.text: 除了张贴的限速外，在选择驾驶速度时还应考虑什么？
translations.explanation: 安全驾驶速度取决于张贴的限速以及当前条件，如天气、交通、能见度和路面情况。
choices: 仅其他驾驶员在做什么

translations.text: O que você deve considerar além do limite de velocidade sinalizado ao escolher sua velocidade de direção?
translations.explanation: A velocidade de direção segura depende dos limites sinalizados, bem como das condições atuais como clima, trânsito, visibilidade e superfície da via.
choices: Apenas o limite de velocidade importa
Trânsito, clima e condições da via
Apenas o que outros motoristas estão fazendo

translations.text: Que devez-vous considérer en plus de la limitation de vitesse affichée quand vous choisissez votre vitesse de conduite ?
translations.explanation: La vitesse de conduite sécuritaire dépend des limites affichées ainsi que des conditions actuelles comme la météo, la circulation, la visibilité et l'état de la chaussée.
choices: Seule la limitation de vitesse importe
La circulation, la météo et les conditions routières
Seulement ce que font les autres conducteurs

text: Speed limits on highways are typically what compared to city streets?
explanation: Highways are designed for faster travel with higher speed limits than city streets, which have more intersections, pedestrians, and potential hazards.

choices.text: It varies by color of pavement

translations.text: Los límites de velocidad en autopistas son típicamente ¿qué comparado con las calles de la ciudad?
translations.explanation: Las autopistas están diseñadas para viajes más rápidos con límites de velocidad más altos que las calles de la ciudad, que tienen más intersecciones, peatones y peligros potenciales.
choices: Varía según el color del pavimento

translations.text: 与城市街道相比，高速公路上的限速通常如何？
translations.explanation: 高速公路设计用于快速行驶，限速比城市街道高，而城市街道有更多交叉口、行人和潜在危险。

translations.text: Os limites de velocidade em rodovias são tipicamente o quê comparado às ruas da cidade?
translations.explanation: Rodovias são projetadas para viagem mais rápida com limites de velocidade mais altos que ruas da cidade, que têm mais cruzamentos, pedestres e perigos potenciais.

translations.text: Les limitations de vitesse sur les autoroutes sont généralement quoi comparées aux rues de ville ?
translations.explanation: Les autoroutes sont conçues pour un déplacement plus rapide avec des limitations de vitesse plus élevées que les rues de ville, qui ont plus d'intersections, de piétons et de dangers potentiels.
choices: Ça varie selon la couleur du pavé

text: What does a speed limit help prevent?
explanation: Speed limits are primarily designed to reduce the risk and severity of traffic accidents by keeping vehicle speeds at safe levels.

choices.text: Cars from running out of gas

translations.text: ¿Qué ayuda a prevenir un límite de velocidad?
translations.explanation: Los límites de velocidad están diseñados principalmente para reducir el riesgo y la gravedad de accidentes de tráfico manteniendo las velocidades de los vehículos en niveles seguros.
choices: Que los autos se queden sin gasolina

translations.text: 限速有助于防止什么？
translations.explanation: 限速主要通过将车辆速度保持在安全水平来降低交通事故的风险和严重性。

translations.text: O que um limite de velocidade ajuda a prevenir?
translations.explanation: Os limites de velocidade são principalmente projetados para reduzir o risco e severidade de acidentes de trânsito mantendo as velocidades dos veículos em níveis seguros.

translations.text: Qu'est-ce qu'une limitation de vitesse aide à prévenir ?
translations.explanation: Les limitations de vitesse sont principalement conçues pour réduire le risque et la gravité des accidents de circulation en gardant les vitesses de véhicules à des niveaux sécuritaires.
choices: Que les gens soient en retard

text: When approaching a curve in the road, what should you do about your speed?
explanation: Curves require reduced speed for safety because higher speeds can cause loss of vehicle control when turning.

choices.text: Speed up to get through quickly

translations.text: 接近道路弯道时，您应该如何处理速度？
translations.explanation: 弯道需要降低速度以确保安全，因为高速可能在转弯时导致车辆失控。

translations.text: Al acercarse a una curva en la carretera, ¿qué debe hacer con su velocidad?
translations.explanation: Las curvas requieren velocidad reducida para la seguridad porque velocidades más altas pueden causar pérdida de control del vehículo al girar.
choices: Mantener exactamente el límite de velocidad

translations.text: Ao se aproximar de uma curva na via, o que você deve fazer com sua velocidade?
translations.explanation: Curvas exigem velocidade reduzida para segurança porque velocidades mais altas podem causar perda de controle do veículo ao fazer a curva.
choices: Manter exatamente o limite de velocidade

translations.text: En approchant d'une courbe sur la route, que devez-vous faire concernant votre vitesse ?
translations.explanation: Les courbes exigent une vitesse réduite pour la sécurité car des vitesses plus élevées peuvent causer une perte de contrôle du véhicule lors du virage.
choices: Maintenir exactement la limitation de vitesse

text: The numbers on speed limit signs represent what?
explanation: In the United States, speed limit signs display the maximum speed in miles per hour (mph).

translations.text: Los números en las señales de límite de velocidad representan ¿qué?
translations.explanation: En Estados Unidos, las señales de límite de velocidad muestran la velocidad máxima en millas por hora (mph).

translations.text: 限速标志上的数字代表什么？
translations.explanation: 在美国，限速标志显示以英里每小时(mph)为单位的最高速度。

translations.text: Os números nas placas de limite de velocidade representam o quê?
translations.explanation: No Brasil, placas de limite de velocidade exibem a velocidade máxima em quilômetros por hora (km/h).

translations.text: Les chiffres sur les panneaux de limitation de vitesse représentent quoi ?
translations.explanation: Au Canada, les panneaux de limitation de vitesse affichent la vitesse maximale en kilomètres par heure (km/h).

text: What should you do if other drivers are exceeding the speed limit?
explanation: You should always follow posted speed limits regardless of what other drivers are doing, as they may be breaking the law.

choices.text: Speed up to keep up with them

translations.text: ¿Qué debe hacer si otros conductores están excediendo el límite de velocidad?
translations.explanation: Siempre debe seguir los límites de velocidad publicados sin importar lo que estén haciendo otros conductores, ya que pueden estar violando la ley.
choices: Acelerar para mantenerse al día con ellos
Seguir el límite de velocidad publicado
Conducir mucho más lento que todos

translations.text: 如果其他驾驶员超速，您应该怎么做？
translations.explanation: 无论其他驾驶员做什么，您都应该始终遵循张贴的限速，因为他们可能违法。
choices: 开得比所有人都慢得多

translations.text: O que você deve fazer se outros motoristas estão excedendo o limite de velocidade?
translations.explanation: Você deve sempre seguir os limites de velocidade sinalizados, independentemente do que outros motoristas estão fazendo, pois eles podem estar infringindo a lei.
choices: Seguir o limite de velocidade sinalizado
Dirigir muito mais devagar que todos

translations.text: Que devez-vous faire si d'autres conducteurs dépassent la limitation de vitesse ?
translations.explanation: Vous devez toujours suivre les limitations de vitesse affichées peu importe ce que font les autres conducteurs, car ils peuvent enfreindre la loi.
choices: Suivre la limitation de vitesse affichée
Rouler beaucoup plus lentement que tout le monde
Leur faire des appels de phares

text: Speed limits are usually posted on which side of the road?
explanation: Speed limit signs are typically posted on the right side of the road where drivers can easily see them.

translations.text: Los límites de velocidad usualmente se publican en ¿qué lado de la carretera?
translations.explanation: Las señales de límite de velocidad típicamente se colocan en el lado derecho de la carretera donde los conductores pueden verlas fácilmente.

translations.text: 限速标志通常张贴在道路的哪一侧？
translations.explanation: 限速标志通常张贴在道路右侧，驾驶员可以轻松看到的地方。

translations.text: Os limites de velocidade são geralmente sinalizados em qual lado da via?
translations.explanation: Placas de limite de velocidade são tipicamente colocadas no lado direito da via onde os motoristas podem vê-las facilmente.

translations.text: Les limitations de vitesse sont généralement affichées de quel côté de la route ?
translations.explanation: Les panneaux de limitation de vitesse sont généralement affichés du côté droit de la route où les conducteurs peuvent facilement les voir.

text: What type of area typically has the lowest speed limits?
explanation: School zones often have the lowest speed limits, sometimes as low as 15 mph, to protect children.

translations.text: ¿Qué tipo de área típicamente tiene los límites de velocidad más bajos?
translations.explanation: Las zonas escolares a menudo tienen los límites de velocidad más bajos, a veces tan bajos como 15 mph, para proteger a los niños.

translations.text: 哪种区域通常有最低的限速？
translations.explanation: 学校区域通常有最低的限速，有时低至15英里每小时，以保护儿童。

translations.text: Que tipo de área tipicamente tem os menores limites de velocidade?
translations.explanation: Zonas escolares frequentemente têm os menores limites de velocidade, às vezes tão baixos quanto 20 km/h, para proteger crianças.

translations.text: Quel type de zone a généralement les limitations de vitesse les plus basses ?
translations.explanation: Les zones scolaires ont souvent les limitations de vitesse les plus basses, parfois aussi basses que 30 km/h, pour protéger les enfants.

text: Speed limits may change based on what?
explanation: Some speed limits vary by time of day, such as reduced speeds in school zones during school hours.

translations.text: 限速可能根据什么而变化？
translations.explanation: 一些限速根据时间而变化，例如在学校时间内学校区域的降速。

translations.text: Los límites de velocidad pueden cambiar basados en ¿qué?
translations.explanation: Algunos límites de velocidad varían según la hora del día, como velocidades reducidas en zonas escolares durante horas escolares.
choices: La estación de radio que suena

translations.text: Os limites de velocidade podem mudar baseados em quê?
translations.explanation: Alguns limites de velocidade variam por horário do dia, como velocidades reduzidas em zonas escolares durante o horário escolar.

translations.text: Les limitations de vitesse peuvent changer selon quoi ?
